agendaItems.title:
File No. B2026-2
Council joined with the Mayor, declaring the month of March 2026 as procurement month in the City of Tampa, to expand on the awareness of the procurement professional’s role to government officials, the general public, business, and corporate leaders. (Original motion initiated by Miranda-Maniscalco on February 19, 2026)
